arts.ttl: 'Sharper than expected': £10m player who recently left Nottingham Forest produces surprising display
Two players who fell out with Steve Cooper at Nottingham Forest help cause FA Cup shock
arts.sum: Forest will hope to join them in the draw...

arts.ttl: 'He's brilliant': Jamie Carragher thinks Nottingham Forest star is now better than £60m Liverpool player
Reece Cole hopes his Exeter City injury frustrations are finally behind him
arts.sum: But fit again, he is hopeful his injury issues are behind him, and he will be ready for the Grecians’ FA Cup tie with Nottingham Forest – and then the 17 game run-in to ensure League One survival. Exeter City midfielder Reece Cole has expressed his determination to overcome past frustrations and make a significant impact following his recent return from injury.

arts.ttl: Preview: Exeter City vs. Nottingham Forest - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's FA Cup clash between Exeter City and Nottingham Forest, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Statistic emerges that dispels common myth about Nottingham Forest under Nuno Espirito Santo
